creator: jamgill@uu.net
text:
when the port for party-2.12 attempts to download the "party-2.12.tar.gz" file, it looks for just ".tar.gz"
this effectively breaks the port, even if you've pulled the correct zipfile down to /usr/ports/distfiles/

Fix: 

adding the line
DISTNAME=       party-2.12
near the top of the Makefile worked for me!
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/irc
fetch ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/ports/irc/party.tar
tar -xvf party
cd party
make
[output:
